creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
On a quick review, this patch requires changes. At least:

COMMENT - remove leading indefinite articles
LICENSE_FILE - add if a license file exists in WRKSRC
USE_PYTHON - sort values

As per the Porters Handbook [1], please run this port through:

 * portlint
 * poudriere

[1] https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/porters-handbook/porting-testing.html
